nasb.text: He shall be with you as a hired man, as if he were a sojourner; he shall serve with you until the year of jubilee.

esv.text: he shall be with you as a hired worker and as a sojourner. He shall serve with you until the year of the jubilee.

cnv.text: 他在你那裡要像雇工和寄居的一樣；他要服事你直到禧年。

ccb.text: 要待他像雇工和寄居者一样。他要为你工作到禧年。
